title: primula × pumila
intro: Primula × pumila, also known as the dwarf primrose, is a small, flowering plant that is a hybrid of the primrose species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Primula × pumila include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
